SFDC_EXT_STORE_LOCATOR.name: Store Locator
SFDC_EXT_STORE_LOCATOR.description: Enables a shopper to find a store based on a given location.

SFDC_EXT_BOPIS.name: Buy Online Pickup In Store
SFDC_EXT_BOPIS.description: Enables a shopper to order online and pick up their order at a physical store. Requires the Store Locator extension to be installed.

SFDC_EXT_MULTISHIP.name: Multiship
SFDC_EXT_MULTISHIP.description: Enables shoppers to ship items to multiple different addresses in a single order.

SFDC_EXT_BNPL.name: (Demo) Buy Now Pay Later
SFDC_EXT_BNPL.description: Renders an inline installment message and a payment-schedule modal on the PDP. Ships with mock fixtures; replace the bodies of the API functions to integrate a real provider (PayPal, Klarna, Affirm, etc.).

SFDC_EXT_CUSTOMER_PREFERENCES.name: (Demo) Customer Preferences
SFDC_EXT_CUSTOMER_PREFERENCES.description: Enables shoppers to manage interests and shopping preferences from their account page.

SFDC_EXT_RATINGS_REVIEWS.name: (Demo) Ratings & Reviews
SFDC_EXT_RATINGS_REVIEWS.description: Renders customer reviews on the PDP, the rating summary on the cart-item modal, and the per-line rate-and-review CTA on order detail. Ships with mock fixtures; replace the bodies of the API functions to integrate a real provider (Bazaarvoice, PowerReviews, Yotpo, Trustpilot, etc.).

SFDC_EXT_PRODUCT_CONTENT.name: (Demo) Product Content
SFDC_EXT_PRODUCT_CONTENT.description: Renders three PDP surfaces backed by editorial / CMS-style content: a returns & warranty card with a 'View Policies' modal, an 'Ask assistant' FAQ, and the merchant-customizable collapsible sections (Materials, Usage Instructions, Care Instructions, Specifications). Ships with mock fixtures; replace the bodies of the API functions to integrate a real CMS, PIM, or Page Designer-backed content service.

SFDC_EXT_SHIPPING_DELIVERY.name: (Demo) Shipping & Delivery
SFDC_EXT_SHIPPING_DELIVERY.description: Renders estimated delivery information on the PDP and provides a zip-code shipping estimator for the BOPIS delivery flow. Ships with mock fixtures; replace the API function bodies to integrate a real shipping provider.
